description: Complaint acknowledgement must occur within three days of intake.

action.description: Acknowledge the complaint and attach acknowledgement evidence.

description: Fraud, unauthorized transaction, or identity theft complaints require escalation.

action.description: Escalate to fraud operations with complaint evidence and AI fraud signal.

description: Legal or regulatory complaint language requires compliance officer review.

action.description: Review legal or regulatory escalation language and preserve evidence for audit.

description: AI complaint response must include required report-ready fields.

action.description: Complete missing AI response fields before the complaint can be treated as report-ready.

description: Complaints unresolved after 30 days require regulatory reporting review.

action.description: Prepare regulatory reporting packet for an unresolved aged complaint.

description: High-value transaction disputes with high urgency require stricter SLA handling.

action.description: Review high-value dispute evidence and confirm accelerated handling path.

description: SLA breach on fraud or unauthorized transaction complaints is a critical compliance risk.

action.description: Escalate breached fraud complaint for compliance officer review.

description: Near-breach high-severity complaints require proactive compliance review.

action.description: Review near-breach high-severity complaint before the SLA deadline passes.

description: Periodic customer KYC update must not be overdue.

action.description: Review overdue KYC update and start remediation workflow.

description: Mandatory KYC information must be present on the customer record.

action.description: Collect missing KYC fields and attach completion evidence.

description: Failed KYC verification requires compliance remediation.

action.description: Escalate failed KYC verification for compliance review.

description: Customer notification must occur within the configured customer protection timeline.

action.description: Review delayed customer notification and document remediation.

description: Unresolved complaints beyond customer protection threshold require review.

action.description: Escalate unresolved customer protection complaint for review.

description: Customer service obligation breaches require compliance review.

action.description: Review breach of customer service obligations and preserve evidence.

description: Mandatory complaint documents must be present.

action.description: Collect missing mandatory documents before closure.

description: Complaint records must be complete and audit ready.

action.description: Complete complaint record fields and attach audit-ready evidence.

description: Complaint investigation evidence must be sufficient for audit review.

action.description: Attach missing investigation evidence before complaint closure.
